tasks.title: POST /v1/invoices/:id/void — void an invoice
tasks.description: New endpoint: POST /v1/invoices/:id/void. Fetches invoice by ID (404 if not found). If status is already CANCELLED returns 400. Otherwise updates status to CANCELLED. Returns 200 with updated invoice. Tests: 200-voided, 200-returned-cancelled-status, 400-already-cancelled, 404-not-found, 500-db-error. File: backend/src/routes/invoices.ts (add route) + tests.

tasks.title: GET /v1/agents — list agents with invoice counts
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/agents. Returns list of distinct agents found in Invoice table: [{ agentId, invoiceCount, totalValueSettled }]. Supports optional ?limit (default 50, max 200) and ?offset (default 0) query params. Tests: 200-returns-array, 200-invoice-count-correct, 200-total-value-settled-correct, 200-empty-state, 500-db-error. File: backend/src/routes/agents.ts (add GET /v1/agents route) + tests.

tasks.title: GET /v1/metrics/summary — high-level KPI summary
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/metrics/summary. Returns { totalInvoices, totalAgents, totalVolumeSettled, avgInvoiceAmount, topAgentId | null }. Reads from Invoice table only. topAgentId = agentId with highest settled volume. Tests: 200-returns-kpis, 200-empty-state-zeroes, 200-top-agent-correct, response-shape-keys, 500-db-error. File: backend/src/routes/metrics.ts (add route) + tests.

tasks.title: GET /v1/settlements/export.csv — export settlements as CSV
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/settlements/export.csv. Returns CSV of all settled/completed invoices: headers [Date, Invoice#, AgentId, Amount, Currency, Network, TxHash]. Sets Content-Type: text/csv and Content-Disposition: attachment. Tests: 200-returns-csv, 200-csv-has-headers, 200-csv-data-rows, 200-content-type-header, 500-db-error. File: backend/src/routes/settlements.ts (add route) + tests.

tasks.title: GET /v1/webhooks/stats — webhook delivery statistics
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/webhooks/stats. Returns { total: number, byEvent: Record<string, number> } based on registered webhooks and their event subscriptions. No DB call for delivery logs — reads from WebhookEndpoint table only. Tests: 200-returns-stats, 200-total-correct, 200-by-event-correct, 200-empty-state, 500-db-error. File: backend/src/routes/webhooks.ts (add GET /v1/webhooks/stats before /:id) + tests.
